title: List your favorite Workspaces below the 'Home' and 'My work' buttons
excerpt: Suggest to add approx. 3 positions for a direct link to a user’s favorite workspaces for easier navigation between most used workspaces.

posts.author: HBHoekie (Hugo)
posts.cookedHtml: Suggest to add approx. 3 positions for a direct link to a user’s favorite workspaces for easier navigation between most used workspaces.
